content_body:
Ready for a Girls' Getaway in Blue Ridge? Make it happen before the summer comes to an end, or any time of the year! There is so much to do in the area, but we've listed some ideas here to give you some inspiration. No matter what you do with your girlfriends, just make it memorable!

Check out our other Girl's Getaway Weekend ideas ~

 

Get Massages

TeaTree's unique "Girlfriend's Gatherings" offer complimentary refreshments in their Tearoom, where you can spend quality time with your friends in your own private relaxation area. Or, if you prefer to stay in, they will come to you! Ask them about making a Cabin Call so you can relax in the privacy of your rental. Call 561-889-7499 or learn more here.

 

Go Ziplining

The most exciting zip line in the Blue Ridge Mountains of North Georgia, you're sure to love Blue Ridge Zipline Canopy Tours. With over 13 platforms and over a mile of zip lines, it will surely make for an experience to remember. Call 800-251-4800 or check out more details here.

 

Enjoy Shopping Downtown

Spend the evening checking out all the unique shops in Downtown Blue Ridge. There is so much great shopping in the area, from clothing boutiques and specialty shops to galleries and home decor shops...not to mention great restaurants with alfresco dining. Downtown Blue Ridge will provide an entire day of enjoyment with your friends that you won’t soon forget.

 

Eat at Chester Brunnemeyer's

Great food, great drinks, and a fun, energetic atmosphere—what more could you want? Lovingly known as Chester’s, this rustic American bar and grill is the perfect spot to enjoy with your girlfriends. It features high-quality food, an impressive wine list, signature cocktails, and regionally crafted beer. Learn more here. 

 

Ride the Incline Railway (The World's Steepest Passenger Railway)

What better way to make once-in-a-lifetime memories than taking a ride along the steepest passenger railway in the world? The Incline Railway carries passengers up (and down!) Lookout Mountain to overlook Chattanooga's gorgeous natural landscape. This popular tourist attraction also includes an observation deck, food service, and a gift shop. Find more details here.

 

Go Horseback Riding

Horseback riding is a great way to unplug and reconnect. Beautiful mountain views, old farmsteads and rural scenery far from the city will have you relaxing in no time! The guides at Adventure Trail Rides are a wealth of information about our area and enjoy talking to guests about all things horses and mountains. Call them at (706) 258-BARN for more information.

Even if you stay at your luxury cabin the entire weekend catching up and relaxing, that is perfectly acceptable! Call us today 706-432-2140, and we would love to help plan out your itinerary and give you some good ideas for your girls' trip to the Georgia mountains!
title: Girls’ Getaway in Beautiful Blue Ridge
